title: orobanche loricata f. balsensis
intro: Orobanche loricata f. balsensis is a subspecies of the parasitic plant Orobanche loricata, belonging to the family Orobanchaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in treating gastrointestinal issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, due to its bitter and anti-inflammatory compounds. The plant is traditionally used for its health benefits, including alleviating symptoms of indigestion, fever, and inflammation, as well as supporting immune function. Orobanche loricata f. balsensis can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for its medicinal use, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies for its purported health benefits.
